---
description: "Translate a feature or authoring requirement into Fullmag ProblemIR changes, validation rules, execution-selection implications, capability updates, and required docs/physics work."
---

Take a requested feature or Python/UI authoring change and translate it into:
- user-facing semantics across Python and UI,
- required `docs/physics/` note or update,
- normalized `ProblemIR` additions,
- validation rules,
- planner/capability/runtime-selection implications,
- requested vs resolved execution representation,
- round-trip and script-export requirements when authoring is affected,
- backend notes for FDM, FEM, CPU, GPU, and hybrid modes where relevant,
- items that should remain out of scope for MVP.
